debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
n : ℕ
v : Vector α n
idx : Fin n
elt : α
⊢ (v.set (↑idx) elt ⋯).toList = v.toList.set (↑idx) elt

failed_attempts:
ext i
      by_cases h : (i : Nat) = idx
      · subst h; simp
      · simp [Vector.get_set_ne, List.get?_set_ne, h]

ext i
      by_cases h : i = idx
      · subst h
        simp
      · simp [Vector.set, List.set, h]
successful_attempts: rfl
rfl

cases v with
      | mk l hl =>
        simp [Vector.set, Vector.toList, List.set, List.setTR]
rfl

cases v with
      | mk l hl =>
        simp [Vector.set, Vector.toList]
simpa [Vector.toList, Vector.set]

cases v with
      | mk l hl =>
        cases idx with
        | mk i hi =>
          simp [Vector.set, Vector.toList, List.set]
simp [Vector.toList, Vector.set, List.set]

cases v with
      | mk l hl =>
        cases idx with
        | mk i hi =>
          simp [Vector.set, Vector.toList]

cases v with

cases v with

        simp [Vector.set, Vector.toList]

cases v with

        | mk i hi =>

rfl

cases v with
      | mk l hl =>
        cases idx with
        | mk i hi =>
          simp [Vector.set, List.set, Vector.toList]
rfl
rfl
rfl
rfl
rfl

cases v with
      | mk l hl =>
        cases idx with
        | mk i hi =>
          simp [Vector.set, Vector.toList, List.set]
simpa [Vector.toList, Vector.set]

cases v with
      | mk l hl =>
        simp [Vector.set, Vector.toList]
simpa [Vector.toList, Vector.set, List.set] using (rfl : (v.set idx elt).1 = (v.1.set idx elt))
